description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:carbon Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test_code job that runs a before_script to download and extract CMake 3.13.4 with wget -qO- "https://cmake.org/files/v3.13/cmake-3.13.4-Linux-x86_64.tar.gz" | tar --strip-components=1 -xz -C /usr/local, then executes the script steps: mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../code, cmake --build ., ctest, and cd .. . In the deploy stage add a pages job that caches the node_modules/ directory, runs npm install gitbook-cli -g, gitbook fetch 3.2.3, gitbook install, then builds the site with gitbook build . public, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in one week, but only on the master branch.
